sections.paragraph:
Original: צוּריאל

Transliteration: tsûrı̂y'êl

Phonetic: tsoo-ree-ale'

BDB Definition:

Zuriel = "my rock is God"
  1. son of Abihail and chief of the Merarite Levites at the time of the exodus

Origin: from H6697 and H410

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
